reasoning: Based on comprehensive evidence analysis: (1) Historical base rate is extremely low - Article 5 invoked only once in 76 years (after 9/11); (2) The September 2025 Polish drone incident resulted in Article 4 consultation, NOT Article 5, even though NATO jets shot down Russian drones over Polish territory; (3) NATO officials and experts stated the September incident did not meet the threshold for Article 5; (4) With only 7 weeks remaining until Dec 31, 2025 and no imminent threats identified, probability should be in low single digits; (5) German general's Nov 7 warning assessed Russian capability, not intent/intelligence of planned attack; (6) Despite heightened tensions and hybrid warfare concerns, actual Article 5 invocation requires armed attack determination, which remains highly unlikely in remaining timeframe.
